The Marshall Project reported: We Asked Ohio's Death Row What They Think of Governor's Death Penalty Reversal. 10TV reported: New Ohio law requires drivers, passengers to provide personal information during traffic stops. Spectrum News reported: DeWine signs bill meant to stop harassment of first responders. WLWT reported: New Ohio law requires drivers, passengers to identify themselves during traffic stops. Cleveland 19 News reported: Gov. DeWine signs law requiring anyone pulled over to disclose name, address, date of birth.
